mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in retail sales signals stronger household nominal spending and near-term revenue momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows RSAFS available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month RSAFS trends do not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than falling trends in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above a low-rate threshold, the discount-rate shock lowers equity valuation multiples and tightens financing conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows FEDFUNDS value of 1.69
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS crossings are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases, or if mean triggered return is not below unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with an elevated policy rate signals late-cycle labor deterioration without immediate monetary relief, causing earnings-risk repricing and negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is above its trailing 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows UNRATE value of 3.9
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not underperform the unconditional 20-day S&P 500 return by at least 50 bps on average, or if positive returns occur in more than 60% of triggered windows.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in industrial production growth signals weakening real activity and operating leverage pressure, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows INDPRO available as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crossings are not followed by below-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward samples, or if the signal has negative-hit-rate below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts recovery above its recent trend signals improving interest-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its trailing 6-month average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows HOUST value of 1319.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside crossings fail to generate positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more often than unconditional frequency, or if average triggered excess return is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Falling CPI momentum while the policy rate stops rising signals disinflation without additional tightening, lowering expected discount rates and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth declines for 2 consecutive months while FEDFUNDS is flat or lower month-over-month
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows CPIAUCSL available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if this joint disinflation-pause trigger does not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth deceleration with unemployment still contained signals reduced wage-pressure risk rather than recession, supporting rate expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average gain falls below its 6-month average while UNRATE remains below 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows PAYEMS and UNRATE available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered cases produce negative 5-day S&P 500 returns more than 55% of the time, or if returns are lower than periods with accelerating PAYEMS and similar UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real GDP confirmed by falling retail sales signals broad demand deterioration and earnings downside, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses below 0% and RSAFS 3-month growth is negative
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows GDPC1 available as of t-4mo and RSAFS as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1 and RSAFS contraction trigger does not underperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns by at least 100 bps on average in walk-forward testing.
